title: INNER JOIN: bookings to users
prompt_md: List each booking alongside the name of the user who made it. Return the booking's `id` aliased as `booking_id` and the user's `name`. Join `bookings` to `users` on the foreign key.
hints: Give tables short aliases: `bookings b`, `users u`.
`JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id` matches each booking to its user.
reference_solution: SELECT b.id AS booking_id, u.name FROM bookings b JOIN users u ON b.user_id = u.id;
